Clean current portion of long-term debt and excludes leases; best match for STD.

Short-term financing item, but may be included within broader current debt; use only if needed as component. Avoided here because a clean current maturities debt line exists and overdrafts may create double counting with interest-bearing current liabilities.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean current portion of debt. Excluded lease lines per instruction and did not add bank overdraft facilities to avoid possible double counting.
